headline: Adagene (ADAG) Partners With Incyte (INCY) to Evaluate Combination Therapy for Colorectal Cancer

headline: Assessing Incyte (INCY) Valuation As Recent Returns Send Mixed Signals
summary: Incyte (INCY) is back on investors’ radar after recent trading, with the share price around US$97.82 and mixed return patterns over the past month and past 3 months prompting closer attention to fundamentals. See our latest analysis for Incyte. The 1 month share price return of 7.75% contrasts with a 3 month share price decline of 4.68%, while the 1 year total shareholder return of 72.22% points to stronger longer term momentum. headline: RBC Capital Lifts PT on Incyte Corporation (INCY) to $95 From $92
summary: Incyte Corporation (NASDAQ:INCY) is one of the most undervalued biotech stocks to buy right now. RBC Capital raised the price target on Incyte Corporation (NASDAQ:INCY) to $95 from $92 on April 7, reiterating a Sector Perform rating on the shares. The rating update came as part of a broader research note previewing the fiscal Q1 results […]
